questions.explanation: TCP provides connection-oriented communication with sequencing, acknowledgments, and retransmissions to ensure reliable delivery.
questions.question: In the TCP/IP model, which protocol is primarily responsible for reliable, connection-oriented delivery of data?

questions.explanation: IEEE 802.3 is the Ethernet standard; 802.11 is Wi-Fi, 802.1Q is VLAN tagging, and 802.1D is classic STP.
questions.question: Which IEEE standard defines Ethernet (wired LAN) at the physical and data link layers?

questions.explanation: 255.255.255.0 has 24 network bits set to 1, which corresponds to a /24 prefix.
questions.question: What is the prefix length of the IPv4 subnet mask 255.255.255.0?

questions.explanation: A Layer 2 switch uses a MAC address table to forward frames within a broadcast domain.
questions.question: Which device primarily forwards traffic based on MAC addresses within a LAN?

questions.explanation: A trunk (e.g., 802.1Q) carries multiple VLANs over one physical link; access ports carry only one VLAN.

options.A: Configure the link as an access port in VLAN 10
options.B: Configure the link as a trunk and allow VLANs 10, 20, 30
options.C: Enable PortFast and BPDU Guard on the link
options.D: Configure the link as a routed port with an IP address

questions.question: You need to carry VLANs 10, 20, and 30 between two switches over a single link. Which configuration is required on that link?

questions.explanation: Type 3 Summary LSAs are generated by ABRs to advertise inter-area routes between OSPF areas.
questions.question: In OSPF, which LSA type is used by an ABR to advertise networks from one area into another (inter-area routes)?

questions.explanation: NetFlow/IPFIX exports flow records that summarize conversations (5-tuple, bytes, packets), enabling traffic analysis without full packet capture.
questions.question: A network engineer wants to monitor interface bandwidth usage per application and top talkers across routers without capturing packets. Which technology best fits this requirement?

questions.explanation: HSRP preempt ensures the intended gateway resumes the active role after it returns, stabilizing gateway selection and reducing prolonged suboptimal states after maintenance.

options.A: Enable HSRP preempt with a higher priority on the preferred active switch
options.B: Increase the HSRP hello timer to 10 seconds
options.C: Disable spanning tree on access ports
options.D: Set the HSRP virtual IP to the broadcast address

questions.question: Two distribution switches run HSRP for VLAN 10. Users report intermittent default-gateway loss during maintenance when the active switch is rebooted. Which design change most directly reduces gateway failover impact for end hosts?

questions.explanation: With other attributes equal, BGP prefers the path with the shortest AS_PATH as it is generally considered a better path.

options.A: Route 1, because longer AS_PATH is preferred for stability
options.B: Route 2, because shorter AS_PATH is preferred
options.C: Route 1, because it was learned first

questions.question: A BGP edge router receives two routes to 203.0.113.0/24 from different eBGP peers. All attributes are equal except: Route 1 has AS_PATH length 3; Route 2 has AS_PATH length 2. Which route will BGP prefer (assuming default decision process and no policy overrides)?

questions.explanation: Repeated SYNs without SYN-ACK typically indicate the SYN or the return SYN-ACK is being filtered/dropped (commonly by a firewall/ACL) or the destination is unreachable at L4; the absence of ICMP suggests silent dropping rather than explicit unreachable messages.

options.A: The client is using the wrong DNS server
options.B: A firewall/ACL is dropping the server’s return traffic or the inbound SYNs
options.C: The client’s TCP window size is too small
options.D: The switch is tagging frames with the wrong 802.1Q VLAN ID on an access port

questions.question: You capture traffic in Wireshark and see repeated TCP SYN packets from a client to a server with no SYN-ACK responses. ICMP is not present. Which is the most likely cause?
